tables.table_note: Table 1 presents the results of predictive modeling for friction-stir welding processes using MTGP. The proposed framework achieved superior predictive accuracy and computational efficiency compared to state-of-the-art models.
Table 2 shows the comparison of radiomic fingerprinting for knee MRI scans. The framework demonstrated improved interpretability and adaptability.
Table 3 highlights the streamflow forecasting results for the Limpopo River Basin. The framework achieved notable improvements in sparsity adaptation.
